overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The footage appears to be rendered in a game engine, featuring grassy terrain and dense forest vegetation under a clear night sky.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily along a narrow dirt trail through a dark forest at night, illuminated only by a flashlight. Tall grass lines both sides of the path while dense forest canopy looms in the darkness ahead. As the path curves slightly left, a large tree trunk becomes visible on the left side of the frame. The environment is devoid of other people or vehicles, creating an isolated atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a secluded forest trail that deepens in its sense of isolation as the path winds further into the dark. It begins with a steady advance down a narrow dirt track, where a flashlight cuts through the gloom to reveal tall grass lining the edges of the way. As the camera progresses, the dense forest canopy looms overhead, enclosing the space in heavy darkness. The scene then shifts as the path curves slightly to the left, bringing a large, imposing tree trunk into view on the side of the frame before continuing forward into the empty, silent wilderness.
